dashboardProtectedFetchProof.detail: Dashboard now uses useAuth() hydrating/user guards before protected credits fetch and redirects once to /login only after hydration if no user.

creditsAuthHeaderProof.detail: Credits page fetches via centralized apiFetch('credits'), which injects Authorization header from authStorage token path.

authMeNoRepeatProof.detail: Dashboard direct getMe() call removed. /auth/me hydration remains centralized in useAuth boot flow (single guarded hydration path).

noUncaughtPromiseProof.detail: Dashboard and Credits protected API calls now run inside async try/catch blocks with controlled 401 transitions and UI error states.

centralized401HandlingProof.detail: apiFetch handles 401 centrally via clearAuthSession() and thrown structured errors; components consume and branch on status without retry loops.

pilotDashboardProof.detail: Live auth contract remains PASS (login 200 + /auth/me 200 ADMIN), and dashboard now waits for auth hydration before credits request.

mahirIsolationProof.detail: RBAC verification still PASS (57/57), preserving non-admin isolation boundaries for Mahir and other USER-role accounts.

buildApi.detail: npm run build --prefix apps/api completed successfully (tsc --build --force).

buildWeb.detail: npm run build --prefix apps/web completed successfully (Vite build).
